_comment: Canon config for learning_state.mjs (Agent #4) — committable, tunable, NOT PII. thresholds = v0 SEED (structure real; latency/runnable numbers are HYPOTHESES calibrated at first R1 run — edit + re-run, lossless since everything derives from reps_log). maidan.stages cross-check concepts.json buckets; maidan.handoffs = real RAG data-flow (domain architecture, NOT a pedagogical prereq-graph — that is Nidhi's domain, deferred). learning_state.mjs READS this only (single-writer preserved); missing ⇒ these defaults.
